organic-the-remittance-company-took-47-i.hook: The remittance company took $47. I sent it back in 4 seconds for $0.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator holds up a Western Union receipt showing a $47 fee on a $200 send — says 'this was my mom's grocery money.' Beat 2 (9-25s): Screen-record of opening Speed Wallet, typing $200, hitting send — timestamp shows 4-second confirmation ping on receiver's phone. Beat 3 (26-45s): Split-screen text overlay: '$47 fee vs $0 fee. Same money. Different rails.' Beat 4 (46-58s): CTA — 'Link in bio. First send free. Tag someone sending money home.'
payload.production_notes: Film receipt close-up in natural light; use native TikTok screen-record for app demo; add trending Latin/Filipino diaspora audio underneath; post Tuesday 6-8 PM EST when remittance audience peaks

organic-pov-you-just-found-bitcoin-in-20.hook: POV: you just found Bitcoin in 2025 — but this time you actually know what to do with it.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Text-on-screen over creator's surprised face: 'Everyone says they wish they found Bitcoin early. Here's the closest thing left.' Beat 2 (8-25s): Explain Lightning Network in one sentence — 'Bitcoin, but instant and free to send' — show Speed Wallet home screen. Beat 3 (26-45s): Creator receives a 'tip' of 1,000 sats from a friend live on camera — phone buzzes, balance updates instantly. Beat 4 (46-58s): 'Download Speed. Your first Bitcoin is waiting.' Text overlay + bio link callout.
payload.production_notes: Stitch or duet format off hook index 1's viral audio if available; keep font large for mobile; use green lightning bolt emoji throughout; post Monday or Thursday when crypto content peaks on FYP

organic-they-charged-my-family-2-5-billi.hook: They charged my family $2.5 BILLION in remittance fees last year. Never again.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-9s): Stat card text-on-screen — 'African diaspora sent $100B home in 2023. Banks and wire services kept $2.5B in fees.' Creator reacts with genuine frustration. Beat 2 (10-28s): Quick explainer: 'Bitcoin Lightning = money moves like a text message, zero fees, arrives in seconds anywhere on Earth.' Beat 3 (29-45s): Show Speed Wallet send flow — enter amount, enter Lightning address, confirm — done. Beat 4 (46-58s): 'Share this with anyone sending money home. The fee era is over.'
payload.production_notes: Lean into diaspora identity — creator should speak directly to their own community (Nigerian, Ghanaian, Ugandan); add bold captions for silent viewing; stat card can be made free in Canva; post Wednesday or Friday

organic-i-let-a-stranger-send-me-5-on-th.hook: I let a stranger send me $5 on the Bitcoin Lightning Network to prove it's real.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator shows QR code on screen — 'First person to scan this sends me $5 in Bitcoin. Watch how fast it hits.' Beat 2 (9-22s): Real-time screen capture — someone scans, payment sent, Speed Wallet buzzes with confirmation — elapsed time shown: '2 seconds.' Beat 3 (23-42s): Creator reacts authentically — 'That's it? No bank. No app store wallet. No 3-day hold. DONE.' Beat 4 (43-58s): 'This is Speed Wallet. Try it. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Real transaction builds maximum trust — coordinate with a teammate to be the 'stranger'; keep the QR code visible for at least 4 seconds; do NOT script the reaction, let it be genuine; post Thursday evening for maximum engagement window

organic-why-do-igaming-sites-take-3-days.hook: Why do iGaming sites take 3 days to pay you out? Speed Wallet doesn't.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Text-on-screen: 'You won. Congrats. Now wait 72 hours for your money.' Creator makes 'seriously?' face. Beat 2 (9-24s): Contrast cut — 'With Speed Wallet you deposit and withdraw via Bitcoin Lightning. Instant. Zero fees. No bank needed.' Beat 3 (25-44s): Screen-record of a withdrawal landing in Speed Wallet — timestamp visible, 3-second arrival. Beat 4 (45-58s): 'Stop waiting for your own money. Download Speed.' Bold CTA text on screen.
payload.production_notes: Keep branding subtle — focus pain on the wait, not gambling itself; use screen-record of a generic wallet receive screen if a live casino withdrawal is not filmable; post Friday or Saturday when iGaming intent spikes; add captions in white bold with black outline for clarity

paid-your-family-never-got-the-full-200-.hook: Your family never got the full $200 you sent. Here's where it went.
paid-your-family-never-got-the-full-200-.estimate: $1.80–$2.50 (40–43% below $3.17 benchmark — high personal relevance and clear fee-pain creative should compress CPI)

payload.problem: Show a receipt animation: $200 sent → $47 in fees → $153 delivered. Voiceover: 'Western Union, MoneyGram, your bank — they all take a cut. Every single time. That's rent money. Grocery money. Gone.'
payload.solution: Cut to Speed Wallet screen-record: $200 entered, Lightning address pasted, sent — recipient phone buzzes in under 5 seconds. Text overlay: '$0 in fees. Full $200 delivered. Powered by Bitcoin Lightning.' Creator voiceover: 'Speed Wallet sends money across borders instantly — and keeps every dollar yours.'
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Send your first $200 free. Link below.
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram): Interest targeting — international money transfer, remittance, Western Union, MoneyGram, OFW, Filipino diaspora, Nigerian diaspora, Latin American diaspora; ages 22-45; US-based with frequent international call/message activity signal

paid-this-is-what-buying-bitcoin-for-the.hook: This is what buying Bitcoin for the first time actually looks like.
paid-this-is-what-buying-bitcoin-for-the.estimate: $2.20–$2.90 (8–31% below $3.17 — strong curiosity-gap creative on TikTok's crypto-curious cohort; test 3:4 and 9:16 aspect ratios simultaneously)

payload.problem: Montage of failed first-timer moments: Coinbase KYC rejected, Binance withdrawal limits, gas fees eating a $20 purchase. Voiceover: 'You wanted to try Bitcoin. Every app made it feel like you needed a finance degree and $500 minimum.'
payload.solution: Speed Wallet screen-record: download → create account in 30 seconds → receive 1,000 sats from a friend instantly → send 500 sats back. Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet is Bitcoin Lightning. No jargon. No minimums. No waiting. Just tap, send, done.' End card shows app icon with 4.8-star rating.
payload.cta: Get Speed Wallet free. Your first Bitcoin takes 60 seconds.
payload.audience: TikTok Ads: Interest clusters — cryptocurrency beginner, personal finance, investing for beginners, fintech apps; behavioral — recently searched 'how to buy Bitcoin,' 'crypto for beginners'; ages 18-34; US; lookalike from Speed's existing crypto-curious user list

paid-you-won-why-is-your-casino-holding-.hook: You won. Why is your casino holding your money for 3 days?
paid-you-won-why-is-your-casino-holding-.estimate: $2.60–$3.10 (2–18% below $3.17 benchmark — iGaming audience has high intent and strong pain-point match; smaller TAM may narrow efficiency gains vs. remittance brief)

payload.problem: Split screen: left side shows a withdrawal-pending screen with '72-hour processing' timer ticking. Right side shows a frustrated player checking their bank account repeatedly. Voiceover: 'You beat the odds. Then your platform made you wait — ACH holds, bank review, fees on withdrawal. Your win isn't really yours yet.'
payload.solution: Speed Wallet deposit/withdrawal flow on a partner iGaming site: funds arrive in Speed wallet in 4 seconds, no fee, no hold. Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet uses Bitcoin Lightning — deposits and withdrawals hit instantly, 24/7, with zero fees. The only wallet built for players who actually win.' Show balance update in real time.
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Instant deposits. Instant payouts. Always.
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram): Interest targeting — online casino, sports betting, poker, DraftKings, FanDuel, iGaming; behavioral — mobile gaming purchasers, high-value app spenders; ages 25-45; US states where online gaming is legal (NJ, PA, MI, CO, NV, IL); exclude problem gambling sensitivity flags per Meta policy
